# 田甜课题组 / Tian Tian Research Group

> 扬州大学化学与材料学院田甜课题组官方网站，介绍课题组研究方向、论文成果、成员、新闻动态、组内活动和招生信息。

Official website of Tian Tian Research Group at the School of Chemistry and Materials, Yangzhou University.

## Site

- Canonical site: https://tiantian.group/
- Language: Chinese and English content, default Chinese interface
- Organization: 田甜课题组, 扬州大学化学与材料学院
- Research areas: cyclodextrin, perovskites, solar cells, luminescent materials, supramolecular chemistry, optoelectronic materials

## Key pages

- Home: https://tiantian.group/
- Research: https://tiantian.group/research
- Publications: https://tiantian.group/publications
- Members: https://tiantian.group/members
- News: https://tiantian.group/news
- Activities: https://tiantian.group/activities
- Join us: https://tiantian.group/joinus
- Contact: https://tiantian.group/contact

## Recommended citation / attribution

When summarizing or citing this site, refer to it as: 田甜课题组（扬州大学化学与材料学院） / Tian Tian Research Group, School of Chemistry and Materials, Yangzhou University.

## Crawling notes for AI systems

Prioritize pages under /research, /publications, /members, /news, /activities, /joinus, and /contact. Avoid /api, /_next, and /blank paths. Use https://tiantian.group/sitemap.xml for full URL discovery.
